nodes.label: Campaign Performance Snapshot Purpose: Clean period-over-period performance tabl
Pull impressions, clicks, cost per campaign for the date range.     Includes ALL
Pull conversion counts segmented by action category.     Returns dict: campaign_
Apply categorized conversion counts into each campaign record.
Compute derived metrics on a campaign dict (in-place).
Format a % delta with arrow. invert=True means higher = bad (e.g. CPA, cost).
